title: Israel Strikes Tehran Pharmaceutical Plant, Claiming Military Link
summary_full: Iran’s foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, said on Tuesday that Israel was “openly and unashamedly bombing pharmaceutical companies.”
summary_public: Iran’s foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, said on Tuesday that Israel was “openly and unashamedly bombing pharmaceutical companies.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Tehran Pharmaceutical Plant, Claiming Military Link
